title: Class 2 scanning input mode — user accepts first option (single_click)
description: Deterministic scenario for the scanning interaction model (doc 12, AAC scanning input pattern). The candidate set is presented one option at a time as separate {n}/{N}. <prompt> utterances. The user replies single_click to accept option 0 (yes), terminating the session immediately with a CLASS_1 transition. Trial run via comparison_condition='class2_scanning_input' which the runner translates to routing_metadata.class2_input_mode='scanning'. Scenario asset only — does not authorize actuation.

steps.description: Publish an insufficient-context payload that drives the policy router into Class 2. The runner attaches routing_metadata.class2_input_mode='scanning' (from comparison_condition='class2_scanning_input').

Class2ClarificationManager.start_session(input_mode='scanning') initialises current_option_index=0, scan_history=[], and announces the scanning preamble ('질문을 하나씩 드리겠습니다. 총 N개입니다. 예 또는 아니오로 답해 주세요.') via TTS.
The manager calls announce_class2_option(0, candidate_choices[0], total_options=N) which speaks '1/N. <state-aware lighting prompt>' (e.g. '1/4. 거실 조명을 켜드릴까요?').

Within scan_per_option_timeout_ms (default 8000ms), the user publishes a button event with event_code='single_click'. _try_handle_as_user_selection routes to the scanning branch and writes entry['scan_decision']=('submit', 0, 'yes'); the per-option event is signaled.

submit_scan_response(option_index=0, response='yes', input_source='user_mqtt_button') terminates the session via the existing submit_selection terminal pipeline. The audit record carries input_mode='scanning' and scan_history=[{option_index:0, response:'yes', candidate_id, elapsed_ms, input_source}].

Publish the terminal clarification record on safe_deferral/clarification/interaction. transition_target='CLASS_1' (the chosen lighting candidate). Validator re-entry is required before any low-risk dispatch.

Observe the audit stream and capture the scanning trace including preamble + option-0 announcement + yes response + terminal record. The integration verifier asserts scan_history length=1, response='yes', and input_mode='scanning'.

transition_outcomes.condition: User accepts the first scanning option via single_click within scan_per_option_timeout_ms.

notes: Scanning mode (doc 12) presents candidates one at a time. This scenario covers the happy path: user accepts option 0 immediately via single_click.
comparison_condition='class2_scanning_input' is the runner-side declaration that translates to routing_metadata.class2_input_mode='scanning' (PR #111 prefix routing).
scan_history records the single yes turn; no caregiver Phase 2 is invoked because the user resolved Phase 1 with a CLASS_1 acceptance.
The Deterministic Validator re-enters with the bounded confirmed candidate before any low-risk dispatch — silence ≠ consent and selection ≠ validator approval invariants are preserved end-to-end.
TTS verbatim invariant (PR #97) carries forward: each per-option utterance contains candidate.prompt as-is.
